name: Oatmeal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the oatmeal, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and cinnamon.
2. In another bowl, beat in 1 cup low-fat milk, 1 egg, 1 tablespoon oil, and 1/4 cup raisins until well combined.
3. Lightly oil a frying pan and spoon batter onto it by tablespoon. Cook until the top bubbles, then turn off when done.
The pancakes are great for lunch sandwiches too. The oatmeal ones are especially good with peanut butter. Food Exchanges per serving: 3 PANCAKES = 3 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 1 MILK EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 484; PRO: 18gm; FAT: 12gm; CAR: 76gm. Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetic by Patricia Mozzer, brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal Master.
